{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rippling Sword Striker
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Rippling Sword Striker]] is a technique that creates a wave of [[sword madra]] and [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Rippling Sword Striker]] is a blood-fueled technique used by [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
